review_text:
The cabins are a complete rip-off. Charging $140 per night more than what some proper motels are charging. Yet the dongas are old and disgusting, the dirty toilet absolutely stank of Urine and sewerage,  which stank into the room. There was a dug plumbing trench behind.
The fridge was disgusting, bedsheet unwashed.
They wouldn't even put a chair in the donga, so people can sit and eat. Just absolutely ridiculous!
Relaxed friendly service
A great, quiet caravan park. Enjoyed the pool. Lovely and accommodating staff. Will definitely be back when I'm next in Alice.
Nice shady lawns, good drinking water and friendly owners. A good place to replenish!
Wont be staying here again|The 1 bedrm cabin was mouldy dirty and in need of a make over |The park is full of car like a junknyard

We didn’t even stay here after seeing the state of the cabin. Sheets were not clean, big stains on ‘white’ sheets. The cabin smelt. Did not feel safe staying there at all. Went across the road to discovery parks & felt safe and secure. Miss this one

We stayed for about a week, the place was clean tidy, pool was clean and cold, dog yard also kept very clean and grass cut low. Very reasonable price staff went out off their way to help. Very quite notes ad well highly recommended. Brad and Tara are great managers. Shame the previous owners are taking back the park.
Nice park, management and staff lovely and hard working,
Fantastic park - great for families and pets. The hosts are sensational - highly recommend, looking forward to visiting again on our way back to Alice next week.

Is mold a pet? If so it is pet friendly indeed. Cleaning is obviously someone else's job here. As it seems is maintenance.

Neighbours were yelling two thirds of the night, at us... for cigarettes and also not giving them cigarettes.

My mother works with their people and understood everything they were yelling at us. Thankfully my dog and 17 year old son don't have a grasp of the language.
I love the Heritage Caravan Park: a very pleasant park with good facilities, a quiet amenity and the  owner and staff are very helpful and kind. Highly recommended!
Friendly helpful staff, great facilities. Enjoy3d our stay
Clean facilities, kind and helpful management and most importantly - safe. Will definitely be staying here again

Very disappointed with the cabin especially the beds. Springs sticking in you
The price was ridiculous for what we got.
When complained was offered a doona to stop springs
Just worked 9 weeks out bush at caravan park and was looking forward to a treat
Very poor customer service

2 days R & R came to stay just spent 9 weeks working out bush and was ready for a treat|Shower fantastic,great  water pressure & hot  and could have our Labrador (only point scorers)|Very disappointed with cabin/price|Very old, beds both disgusting springs sticking you, rolling out if on edge and middle of bed huge ridge, the worst i have slept on|Told Managers and they offered a doona on bed to fix, lovely people|Will never stay here again
Great caravan park. I've stayed here a few times.

We stayed here three nights. Lovely quiet caravan park. We got a powered site. It was clean and tidy.
Quite close to the town - about a 10 minute drive. And very close to the Alice Springs Brewing Co - eat in or take away. Their pizzas are great!
The amenities block is a bit dated but it was very clean, with really hot showers. This is also a dog friendly park so it was nice to see the dogs as well.
The owners are doing their very best to get the park updated.
The community kitchen had electric jugs, microwave, toasters, BBQ and lots of chairs and tables - they even have a large screen TV on the wall.
Contrary to another reviewer's comment about there being no dump point, I'd like to state that there is a dump point near the amenity block!
They have a pool - we didn't see anyone using it, as well as playground equipment for the kids.
A lovely relaxing couple of days - thank you!

Great caravan/cabin park for travellers. Large bushy sites, very dog friendly including free dog run.  New owners making improvements along the way. Give it time as amenities are clean but dated. Great hot showers..

I love this park and the owners. Everyone is so helpfull and friendly. Stayed here 2 times when my wife was alive. Returned here this year with my dog. Great walk through the bush section with my dog. Special enclosed section for dogs with leads off. Great hot showers and everything is so clean. Will keep coming back.
A “vintage” style caravan park … nice and quiet. Yes the amenities need up dating but they are all serviceable. This is our 3rd stay at this park.
No issues with this budget-friendly caravan park. Would definitely stay again.

Had a great caravan stay at Heritage with Jason and his family of staff. Advised he’s only recently taken back over after a long journey with previous management and he, his father and the rest of the team doing a power of work to get things up to speed.

Facilities were a little run down but as I said they are truly pushing out the work to get it up and going. One of the best showers I’ve had I. 7 weeks!!!.

The team dog sat out two dogs Juni and Marley for portions of 3 days and with plenty of kennels out back I’m sure would be more than willing to do so for others.  This is how the business was originally built on dog friendly principles.

Dogs wash was great again needs tweaking to fully get back up and running and with a great free time area for the dogs I can’t talk more highly of this place if you have dogs.

Time will be the making of it and given they have only had it back for a few weeks it should be a great park once again.

Thanks again and look forward to returning in the future.

Best wishes Stuart, Eve, Juni and Marley 😊
Unpowered site was spacious and well located

Second year staying at this park and it’s perfect. It is an older park has everything you need and staff and so friendly and helpful. They were able to accomodate us even at last minute. Very grateful!

Only 4 stars due to not having an open dump point which is an issue and the playground being shut but will continue to come back!
Thanks heaps!

I decided to stay here because it was 5 km from the CBD of Alice Springs and away from all the issues that is happening there. The staff were great and service was good even when I made a last minute booking because I was arriving a day early and it was not a problem because they found a cabin for me to stay in and would stay again here.
Great for caravan.  Friendly staff.

Stayed on a powered site near the pool. sites are very long and narrow and aren't clearly marked. The staff weren't very friendly or helpful. Bathrooms are very old and half the bathroom doors wouldn't close properly and toilets were hot and miss with flushing. Showers were amazing though. Was out of town so had no issues, wouldn't stay again though

I wouldn't stay there again
They charged my credit card after I left
Even knowing I never gave them my card number to pay
But still from paywave they got my card numbers
Charged me extra for not washing or cleaning my room
I didn't even sleep in there bed
Put my blanket over there bed

I find it to be fraud to get my card numbers to make extra charges against me card.

Had to cancel the two rooms I had booked 17 days before booking day. said money would be credited back (13/11/2024 ) .had to get onto my bank ANZ to start dispute now 24/11/2024 still no refund . Bank did say could take awhile must say staff were friendly but no help as I rang   Three times
Park heritage caravan park Alice Springs nt
Nice staff. It's clean, but the bed is small for 2. The shower is good and new.
Has everything you need. It’s in a nice and quiet part of Alice Springs - just out of town. We’ve stayed here twice and we’ll stay here next time we’re in Alice Springs.
Awesome park loved it, a bit amenities a bit dated but clean, what more can you ask for. Would recommend, staying one night turned out three nights.

Really good pet friendly cabins, slightly older style and a little run down in places  but overall clean and tidy nonetheless and good value for money and excellent you can have your pet in the room with you. An off leash area, lovely pool and friendly service 🐕‍🦺

Stayed here with my partner for 3 days. The owners, Brad + Tara were very lovely and the site was quite safe + secure. Walking distance to a great brewery and only a short drive to town. Had a great time here & in Alice. Would revisit and stay here again.
Great secure spot, been here 6 times and yes will come again, every thing you need is here

Stayed 3 nights, good park with some grass sites, power & water.|Amenities are old but clean.  Just on the out skirts of the town. Felt quite safe here. Would stay again if travelling to Darwin again. The young girl (about 12) was very  quick and efficient checking us in, she diffently knew what she was doing.

We stayed at the heritage park and felt so safe and looked after. Brad and Tara were absolutely phenomenal and so informative regarding what to do around Alice. We stayed for 3 days and felt so so safe and stress free. The shower pressure was also amazing!! Thank you so much for having us we will definitely be back.
Great caravan park. Stayed with three lots of us in three troop carriers and felt very safe, no dramas and everyone was friendly and very helpful!
Great caravan park - we always stay here
Had caravan site, room particulars no relevant.

Very noisy. Terrible service.
Extra hidden charges
Always friendly obliging staff.

I booked an ensuite cabin which turned out to be a little shipping container-turned-donga. While there was a double bed, I would have hated to be a couple staying there as it was pretty small. The cabin was as clean as you could probably get it, but was in need of a little TLC with the floor collapsing in over the bathroom threshold and TV remote not working. The dog courtyards for some of the cabins are a great idea, and it's very pet friendly with its off-leash dog area. Service was wonderful and I sensed they're doing the best they can with what they've got.
Fantastic caravan park and great staff
Nice and quiet away from Alice CBD
Safe well priced nice room

Ideal gelegen. Da wir mit dem Auto unterwegs waren, war dies für einige Tage perfekt, um Tagestrips nach Alice Springs zu unternehmen.
Genug Platz und günstige Zimmer. Man kann im Auto nächtigen, es hat Plätze für grössere Camper und auch verfügbare, schlichte Zimmer. Ein Zimmer gönnten wir uns und konnten da auch ideal und unsere Wäsche in dafür vorgesehene, ich nenne es mal "Waschgebäude" waschen.
=> Für mich wichtig und ich fände es schade, wenn nicht......., dass ich in meinen Rezensionen nichts beschönige und meine Eindrücke, wie ich sie ehrlich und live erlebt habe, schildere. Weiteres folgt:
*2001
Staff are very friendly they can take a joke do anything for you great fireworks display by Brad will keep going back. Luv ya’s

10m drive from airport. Staff helpful with fast response.  Our assigned "double room with private bathroom" C05  was worse:  TV remote didn't work, Air-con water leakage was serious!!!!😭😭😭  Called Staff for help and arranged to move to another caravan room.
All in-room toilets space were very small and you legs can't buckled after toilet door closed 🥴🥴🥴

We booked a room (shipping container) for a night and it was the worst night of my life. Throughout it we were uncomfortable to sleep because of the air-con compressor's loud noise as it was turning on and off repeatedly. On top of that, there was this mind-torturing sound of water dripping from the tree above our room which was super annoying..
when i checked out and told the receptionist about the issue, she didn't even feel sorry for it. it seemed like it was normal for her.
Stayed here a few times because it's out of town and not always busy/packed. The kids loved the pool size was in it every day. It's also affordable

We only stay at the Heritage when in Alice, Excellent location not far from the Stuart highway so it's easy to find and access, Brad and Tara make sure you feel welcome, Large size and very clean swimming pool, very clean amenities and grounds, Looking forward to getting back here soon
Great value pet friendly cabins. For sure will stay here again when next passing through Alice

Good cabins that were pet friendly. We stayed with our cat and dog they enjoyed it. Easy contactless check-in. Good big pool and other convenient amenities. Air conditioner wasn’t quite sufficient during the middle of the day when 40+ degrees but would be fine in less extreme conditions. We would stay here again.
Great place to stay with family and friends

These folks were so friendly and helpful. The Amenities were clean and well taken care of and the place felt very safe and secure.  The grounds were quite “birdy” for the bird-liver in the group. We spent 2 nights here and would use that as a base again.

I have stayed here always when I come to Alice Springs.
Great place quite and secure safety.
Great prices for rooms and camping.
Wonderful customer service.
Rooms are delightful and cosy.
Will always stay here as its a very pleasant enjoyable park.
I give them 10 stars

Beautiful cabin, comfy bed, heaps of space, dog friendly and a great pool, amazing clean and tidy grounds and very helpful staff.  |Easy to find and only a few minutes drive from Centre of town.|Great cooking facilities in camp kitchen, large TV to watch whilst cooking.

I have been staying at Heritage Caravan park for many, many years. Each time the experience is the same friendly one. The rooms are starting to look a little tired, but the staff make sure they are clean and tidy, and well presented. For those concerned abut public safety in Alec Springs, can throughly recommend the Heritage Caravan park away from the noise and trouble that seems to be on the north side of the Gap

We stayed here for RCN09 we loved the fact that it was very Animal friendly.
We had a pet friendly cabin which was clean and tidy.
The grounds were pleasant and the Amenities were very clean.
The owners and staff running it were absolutely amazing. We would happily recommend this park to everyone.
We will most definitely stay here when we visit Alice Springs again. 👌
Only stayed one night in our motorhome but very nice with friendly staff.

Heritage Caravan Park is a hidden treasure! The park's serene atmosphere and beautiful surroundings create the perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of city life. The well-maintained facilities, spacious pitches, and friendly staff make for a delightful camping experience. Whether you're in a tent or a caravan, you'll feel right at home. The park's location is also ideal, with easy access to nearby attractions and stunning natural landscapes. The amenities, including clean showers and well-equipped communal areas, ensure a comfortable stay. The on-site activities, such as hiking trails and a swimming pool, provide endless entertainment for both adults and children. The park's commitment to sustainability and eco-friendly practices is commendable. The staff goes above and beyond to make guests feel welcome and are always ready to assist with any inquiries or requests. Overall, Heritage Caravan Park offers a memorable and enjoyable camping experience that will leave you wanting to return again and again. Don't miss out on this hidden gem!

The park itself is just out of town. The upside is that it's a big park for camping and the camp kitchen is large with lots of fridge space, bbqs, tables and pots and pans.  The pool is clean and refreshing.  The cabins are tired and in need of some upkeep. The studio cabins are very small but enough for a one night stay.  The beds in the 2 bedroom are very comfortable but bring a blanket in winter (no spare in cabin). There is reverse cycle aircon though and the unit was new so worked well.  Laundry had 5 washers and 2 driers. No internet but phones worked well so had own internet.  The cabins also needed a good clean.  Only a short drive into town and not too close to major road so very quiet.

Excellent wide caravan sites, level, grassed and easy to access. Double points for the of leash dog exercise area, this was important to us travelling with dogs, finding off lead parks is difficult. All the facilities were clean and easy to access. Staff were friendly and polite. Will be staying again.

Great park even greater staff and management.  We were on a road trip from vic ,my partner had a medical episode and ended up in hospital and transferred to Adelaide hospital for further treatment.  I do not drive and found myself stranded in the nt and they were so empathetic and helpful, organised transport for me to and from the hospital, extended my stay and gave me priority to make my stay effortless and I didn't have to worry about accommodation and storage of van. I can't thank them enough.

Stayed 6 days on powered site, older style park dog friendly amenities clean showers hot with good pressure bathroom clean and well maintained, staff extremely helpful and friendly reasonably priced would stay again.
Easy access with big van,very friendly, clean, and animal friendly 👌
It's pretty good here. Just out of town. Nice and quiet. Large amenities block. Some nice birds in the trees.
Very nice
Lovely park
